site.name: SafeWebTool
site.description: SafeWebTool is a free, open-source set of in-browser tools for everyday tasks. Your photos, videos, text, and files stay on your computer.
site.privacy: Your files stay private - processing happens in your browser. **No uploads, no login, no ads, no paywalls**. Free, open-source tools [built by the community](https://github.com/ratheeshkpattambi/safewebtool).

agentPolicy.mcpRecommendation: Use MCP for read-only discovery resources first. Keep private image/video processing in the user browser.
agentPolicy.privacyRule: Do not send user media files to remote services unless the user explicitly requests that.

video.name: Video Tools
video.description: Free online video tools for resizing, converting, and analyzing videos. No upload required - all processing happens in your browser.

image.name: Image Tools
image.description: Free online image editing and optimization tools. Resize, crop, and convert images without uploading them to a server.

text.name: Text Tools
text.description: Free online text editing and formatting tools. Edit, validate, and convert text and code formats in your browser.

ml.name: ML Tools
ml.description: Run machine learning models locally in your browser. No uploads, no server-side processing.

time.name: Time Tools
time.description: Simple browser-based time tools for timers, meeting planning, time zones, deadlines, and date math.

image/compressor.name: Image Compressor
image/compressor.description: Free online image compressor. Reduce file size of JPEG, PNG, and WebP images while maintaining visual quality, all processed locally in your browser.

privacy.note: SafeWebTool tools are designed to process user data locally in the browser.

howToUse: Upload your image by dropping it or selecting from your device
Adjust compression quality using the slider (lower = smaller file)
Choose output format (auto, JPEG, PNG, or WebP)
Optionally preserve EXIF metadata
Click "Compress Image" to process
Compare before and after results
Download the compressed image
image/compressor.useCase: Perfect for reducing image file sizes for web use, email attachments, or storage optimization while maintaining good visual quality.
exampleTasks: Open https://safewebtool.com/image/compressor and use Image Compressor.
automationNotes: Prefer the stable selectors in this contract over visible text where possible.
Wait for selectors.ready before interacting with the tool UI.
Do not upload private user media to a remote agent service; operate the browser-local UI instead.

image/crop.name: Image Crop
image/crop.description: Free online image crop tool. Crop images by exact pixel dimensions and position, all processed locally in your browser.

privacy.note: SafeWebTool tools are designed to process user data locally in the browser.

howToUse: Open the page and start with the built-in sample image or upload your own image
Set X/Y position and crop width/height in pixels
Use quick actions to center or reset the crop area
Click "Crop Image" to process and download the result
image/crop.useCase: Perfect for removing unwanted edges, extracting a subject, or preparing exact image dimensions for websites and social media.
exampleTasks: Open https://safewebtool.com/image/crop and use Image Crop.
automationNotes: Prefer the stable selectors in this contract over visible text where possible.
Wait for selectors.ready before interacting with the tool UI.
Do not upload private user media to a remote agent service; operate the browser-local UI instead.

image/passport-photo.name: Passport Photo Maker
image/passport-photo.description: Free private passport, visa, and ID photo maker. Auto-align faces in your browser, crop to official sizes, export digital JPEGs, and create print sheets with no uploads.

privacy.note: Photos are processed in the browser. MediaPipe face assist may download a model/library, but the user photo is not uploaded.

howToUse: Choose a passport, visa, or ID photo preset
Upload a portrait photo from your device
Use browser face assist to auto-align the head, then fine-tune manually
Download a digital photo or a 4x6 print sheet
image/passport-photo.useCase: Make correctly sized passport, visa, and ID photos without uploading your face photo to a server or paying for a simple digital export.
exampleTasks: Create a 600x600 US passport photo from a local portrait image.
Create a US visa digital JPEG under the target file-size limit.
Create a 4x6 print sheet for local printing.
automationNotes: Prefer the stable selectors in this contract over visible text where possible.
Wait for selectors.ready before interacting with the tool UI.
Do not upload private user media to a remote agent service; operate the browser-local UI instead.

image/resize.useCase: Perfect for reducing image size for websites, social media, or email attachments.

The tool will highlight detected faces on the image.

ml/image2text.name: Image to Text (OCR)
ml/image2text.description: Convert images to text with 100% privacy. This offline OCR tool runs entirely in your browser using Tesseract.js. No uploads, no servers — just fast and secure image-to-text conversion.

privacy.note: SafeWebTool tools are designed to process user data locally in the browser.

howToUse: Upload an image containing text
Select the language of the text in the image
Click "Extract Text" to start OCR processing
View the extracted text with confidence score
Copy or download the text as needed
ml/image2text.useCase: Extract text from screenshots, scanned documents, photos of signs, receipts, or any image containing text. Perfect for digitizing printed content while maintaining complete privacy.
exampleTasks: Open https://safewebtool.com/ml/image2text and use Image to Text (OCR).
automationNotes: Prefer the stable selectors in this contract over visible text where possible.
Wait for selectors.ready before interacting with the tool UI.
Do not upload private user media to a remote agent service; operate the browser-local UI instead.

ml/transcribe.name: Audio/Video Transcription
ml/transcribe.description: Convert speech to text with 100% privacy using Whisper. This offline transcription tool runs entirely in your browser. Supports audio and video files with automatic audio extraction.

privacy.note: SafeWebTool tools are designed to process user data locally in the browser.

howToUse: Upload an audio or video file
Select the Whisper model (Tiny English)
Click "Transcribe Audio" to start processing
View the transcript with timestamps
Copy or download in TXT, SRT, or VTT format
ml/transcribe.useCase: Transcribe podcasts, meetings, interviews, lectures, or any audio/video content. Perfect for creating captions, notes, or text records while maintaining complete privacy.
exampleTasks: Open https://safewebtool.com/ml/transcribe and use Audio/Video Transcription.

text/json-formatter.name: JSON Formatter & Converter
text/json-formatter.description: Validate, format, minify, and convert JSON to XML, CSV, or YAML. All processing happens in your browser, no uploads required.

privacy.note: SafeWebTool tools are designed to process user data locally in the browser.

howToUse: Paste your JSON data into the input area or click "Upload Data" to load from a file.
Click "Validate" to check if the JSON is well-formed.
Select tab spacing and click "Format / Beautify" for readable JSON.
Click "Minify / Compact" to get a compact version.
Choose a target format (XML, CSV, YAML) and click "Convert".
Click "Download" to save the output.
text/json-formatter.useCase: Ideal for developers and data analysts to quickly inspect, clean up, or transform JSON data for various applications without server-side processing.
